name: biomind
description: Biomedical research assistant — searches arXiv papers using BM25 and answers questions with Groq LLM.

tools.name: search_papers
tools.description: Search arXiv for biomedical research papers by query. Returns titles, authors, publication dates, abstracts, and PDF links.

max_results.description: Maximum number of papers to return

tools.name: ask_biomind
tools.description: Answer biomedical questions by searching arXiv papers and using BM25 retrieval with Groq LLM. Returns grounded answer with citations to source papers.

query.description: Search query to fetch papers from arXiv (e.g., 'cancer immunotherapy')

question.description: Specific biomedical question to answer (e.g., 'What are recent therapeutic approaches?')

k.description: Number of most relevant papers to use for answering

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Returns current BioMind status: number of indexed papers in BM25 index and papers in cache.

mcpServerConfig.description: Start BioMind MCP server via uv
